mapper.sql: project_id, project_no, tenant_id, project_name, workflow_type, scope_type, building_id, unit_name, fund_source, governance_path, status, active_plan_id, version, created_by_account_id, created_by_user_id, create_time, update_time

plan_id, project_id, tenant_id, version_no, plan_description, budget_total, fund_source, allocation_rule_type, allocation_rule_description, supplier_selection_method, supplier_selection_reason, construction_management_requirements, evidence_requirements_json::TEXT AS evidence_requirements_json, safety_requirements, acceptance_method, required_acceptance_roles_json::TEXT AS required_acceptance_roles_json, affected_owner_scope_description, minimum_affected_owner_acceptors, affected_owner_pass_rule, affected_owner_approval_ratio, settlement_method, planned_start_date, planned_completion_date, warranty_days, governance_path, price_review_required, payment_milestones_json::TEXT AS payment_milestones_json, status, authorization_snapshot_hash, authorization_frozen_by_user_id, authorization_frozen_at, snapshot_hash, created_by_account_id, created_by_user_id, locked_by_user_id, create_time, locked_at
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT project.project_id, project.project_no, project.tenant_id, project.project_name, project.workflow_type, project.scope_type, project.building_id, project.unit_name, project.fund_source, project.governance_path, project.status, project.active_plan_id, project.version, project.created_by_account_id, project.created_by_user_id, project.create_time, project.update_time FROM t_repair_project project JOIN t_repair_work_point work_point ON work_point.project_id = project.project_id AND work_point.plan_id = project.active_plan_id AND work_point.tenant_id = project.tenant_id JOIN t_repair_work_point_source source ON source.work_point_id = work_point.work_point_id AND source.tenant_id = project.tenant_id WHERE source.work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND project.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY project.update_time DESC, project.project_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM t_repair_project WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_plan_version ( project_id, tenant_id, version_no, plan_description, budget_total, fund_source, allocation_rule_type, allocation_rule_description, supplier_selection_method, supplier_selection_reason, construction_management_requirements, evidence_requirements_json, safety_requirements, acceptance_method, required_acceptance_roles_json, affected_owner_scope_description, minimum_affected_owner_acceptors, affected_owner_pass_rule, affected_owner_approval_ratio, settlement_method, planned_start_date, planned_completion_date, warranty_days, governance_path, price_review_required, payment_milestones_json, status, created_by_account_id, created_by_user_id ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{tenantId}, #{versionNo}, #{planDescription}, #{budgetTotal}, #{fundSource}, #{allocationRuleType}, #{allocationRuleDescription}, #{supplierSelectionMethod}, #{supplierSelectionReason}, #{constructionManagementRequirements}, CAST(#{evidenceRequirementsJson} AS JSONB), #{safetyRequirements}, #{acceptanceMethod}, CAST(#{requiredAcceptanceRolesJson} AS JSONB), #{affectedOwnerScopeDescription}, #{minimumAffectedOwnerAcceptors}, #{affectedOwnerPassRule}, #{affectedOwnerApprovalRatio}, #{settlementMethod}, #{plannedStartDate}, #{plannedCompletionDate}, #{warrantyDays}, #{governancePath}, #{priceReviewRequired}, CAST(#{paymentMilestonesJson} AS JSONB), #{status}, #{createdByAccountId}, #{createdByUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_repair_plan_version WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY version_no DESC
SELECT FROM t_repair_plan_version WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT decision_scope_id, project_id, tenant_id, scope_type, building_id, unit_name, verification_status, verification_basis, legacy_read_only, create_time FROM t_repair_project_decision_scope WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_project_responsibility_determination ( project_id, tenant_id, version_no, status, responsibility_path, funding_source_type, execution_authority_type, basis_attachment_id, basis_reference, responsible_party_name, responsible_party_reference, proposed_by_account_id, proposed_by_user_id, proposed_at ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{tenantId}, #{versionNo}, #{status}, #{responsibilityPath}, #{fundingSourceType}, #{executionAuthorityType}, #{basisAttachmentId}, #{basisReference}, #{responsiblePartyName}, #{responsiblePartyReference}, #{proposedByAccountId}, #{proposedByUserId}, #{proposedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT determination_id, project_id, tenant_id, version_no, status, responsibility_path, funding_source_type, execution_authority_type, basis_attachment_id, basis_reference, responsible_party_name, responsible_party_reference, proposed_by_account_id, proposed_by_user_id, proposed_at, confirmed_by_account_id, confirmed_by_user_id, confirmed_at, confirmation_note, create_time FROM t_repair_project_responsibility_determination WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status IN ('PENDING_CONFIRMATION', 'CONFIRMED')

SELECT determination_id, project_id, tenant_id, version_no, status, responsibility_path, funding_source_type, execution_authority_type, basis_attachment_id, basis_reference, responsible_party_name, responsible_party_reference, proposed_by_account_id, proposed_by_user_id, proposed_at, confirmed_by_account_id, confirmed_by_user_id, confirmed_at, confirmation_note, create_time FROM t_repair_project_responsibility_determination WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY version_no DESC

SELECT funding_slice_id, responsibility_determination_id, decision_scope_id, project_id, tenant_id, source_type, source_record_type, source_record_id, ledger_reference, allocation_snapshot_hash, approved_amount, verification_status, legacy_read_only, verified_at, create_time FROM t_repair_funding_slice WHERE decision_scope_id = #{decisionScopeId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY funding_slice_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_work_point ( project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, business_name, building_id, unit_name, location_type, reference_room_id, common_area_name, space_name, orientation, component, specific_part, symptom, cause_status, cause_basis, proposed_measure, technical_requirements, quantity, unit, preliminary_estimated_amount, estimate_source, sort_order, legacy_read_only ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{planId}, #{tenantId}, #{businessName}, #{buildingId}, #{unitName}, #{locationType}, #{referenceRoomId}, #{commonAreaName}, #{spaceName}, #{orientation}, #{component}, #{specificPart}, #{symptom}, #{causeStatus}, #{causeBasis}, #{proposedMeasure}, #{technicalRequirements}, #{quantity}, #{unit}, #{preliminaryEstimatedAmount}, #{estimateSource}, #{sortOrder}, #{legacyReadOnly} )
INSERT INTO t_repair_work_point_source (work_point_id, work_order_id, tenant_id) VALUES (#{workPointId}, #{workOrderId}, #{tenantId})
mapper.select: SELECT work_point_id, project_id, plan_id, tenant_id, business_name, building_id, unit_name, location_type, reference_room_id, common_area_name, space_name, orientation, component, specific_part, symptom, cause_status, cause_basis, proposed_measure, technical_requirements, quantity, unit, preliminary_estimated_amount, estimate_source, sort_order, legacy_read_only, create_time FROM t_repair_work_point WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY sort_order, work_point_id
SELECT work_order_id FROM t_repair_work_point_source WHERE work_point_id = #{workPointId} ORDER BY work_order_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_repair_plan_allocation_room ( plan_id, tenant_id, room_id, building_id, unit_name, owner_uid, build_area ) SELECT #{planId}, #{tenantId}, selected.room_id, selected.building_id, selected.unit_name, selected.owner_uid, selected.build_area FROM (
) selected
mapper.select:
SELECT CASE WHEN #{scopeType} = 'COMMUNITY' THEN COALESCE(community.property_area_name, community.tenant_name) || ' · 全小区' WHEN #{scopeType} = 'BUILDING_UNIT' THEN COALESCE(community.property_area_name, community.tenant_name) || ' · ' || COALESCE(MAX(selected.building_name), CONCAT(#{buildingId}::TEXT, ' 号楼')) || ' · ' || #{unitName} ELSE COALESCE(community.property_area_name, community.tenant_name) || ' · ' || COALESCE(MAX(selected.building_name), CONCAT(#{buildingId}::TEXT, ' 号楼')) || ' · 整栋' END AS scope_label, COUNT(selected.room_id)::BIGINT AS room_count, COUNT(DISTINCT selected.owner_uid)::BIGINT AS owner_count, COALESCE(SUM(selected.build_area), 0)::NUMERIC(14, 2) AS total_build_area FROM t_tenant_community community LEFT JOIN (
) selected ON TRUE WHERE community.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND community.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY community.property_area_name, community.tenant_name

SELECT CASE WHEN project.scope_type = 'COMMUNITY' THEN COALESCE(community.property_area_name, community.tenant_name) || ' · 全小区' WHEN project.scope_type = 'BUILDING_UNIT' THEN COALESCE(community.property_area_name, community.tenant_name) || ' · ' || COALESCE(MAX(roster.building_name), CONCAT(project.building_id::TEXT, ' 号楼')) || ' · ' || project.unit_name ELSE COALESCE(community.property_area_name, community.tenant_name) || ' · ' || COALESCE(MAX(roster.building_name), CONCAT(project.building_id::TEXT, ' 号楼')) || ' · 整栋' END AS scope_label, COUNT(DISTINCT allocation.room_id)::BIGINT AS room_count, COUNT(DISTINCT allocation.owner_uid)::BIGINT AS owner_count, COALESCE(SUM(allocation.build_area), 0)::NUMERIC(14, 2) AS total_build_area FROM t_repair_plan_allocation_room allocation JOIN t_repair_plan_version plan ON plan.plan_id = allocation.plan_id AND plan.tenant_id = allocation.tenant_id JOIN t_repair_project project ON project.project_id = plan.project_id AND project.tenant_id = plan.tenant_id JOIN t_tenant_community community ON community.tenant_id = allocation.tenant_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT item.building_name FROM c_property_roster item WHERE item.tenant_id = allocation.tenant_id AND item.room_id = allocation.room_id AND item.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY item.roster_id LIMIT 1 ) roster ON TRUE WHERE allocation.plan_id = #{planId} AND allocation.tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY community.property_area_name, community.tenant_name, project.scope_type, project.building_id, project.unit_name

SELECT allocation_room_id, plan_id, tenant_id, room_id, building_id, unit_name, owner_uid, build_area, create_time FROM t_repair_plan_allocation_room WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY building_id, unit_name NULLS LAST, room_id

SELECT selected.room_id, selected.building_id, selected.building_name, selected.unit_name, selected.room_name, selected.owner_uid FROM (
) selected ORDER BY selected.building_name, selected.unit_name NULLS LAST, selected.room_name, selected.room_id

SELECT plan_affected_owner_id, plan_id, tenant_id, room_id, building_id, building_name, unit_name, room_name, owner_uid, affected_reason, source_type, create_time FROM t_repair_plan_affected_owner WHERE plan_id = #{planId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY building_name, unit_name NULLS LAST, room_name, room_id

SELECT attachment_id, project_id, tenant_id, object_key, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, etag, sha256, uploaded_by_account_id, uploaded_by_user_id, create_time FROM t_repair_project_attachment WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, attachment_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_plan_attachment (plan_id, attachment_id, purpose, sort_order) VALUES (#{planId}, #{attachmentId}, #{purpose}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT link.attachment_id, link.purpose, link.sort_order FROM t_repair_plan_attachment link JOIN t_repair_plan_version plan ON plan.plan_id = link.plan_id WHERE link.plan_id = #{planId} AND plan.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY link.sort_order, link.attachment_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_repair_project_event ( project_id, tenant_id, action, actor_account_id, actor_user_id, actor_owner_uid, payload_json ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{tenantId}, #{action}, #{actorAccountId}, NULL, #{actorOwnerUid}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS JSONB) )
mapper.select: SELECT project_event.event_id, project_event.project_id, project_event.tenant_id, project_event.action, project_event.create_time AS occurred_at FROM t_repair_project_event project_event WHERE project_event.project_id = #{projectId} AND project_event.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY project_event.create_time ASC, project_event.event_id ASC
